body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This moves LAI, SAI, RAI and rooting depth to a new biomass component of the canopy. The canopy height is included here.

We do this for two reasons:
- it doesnt make sense for these to "belong" in PlantHydraulics, especially in the future when we need to predict LAI using a model
- with other moisture stress parameterizations, or a different plant hydraulics scheme, we do not need to use "PlantHydraulicsModel", but still need LAI, rooting depth, height, etc.


## To-do
long runs here https://buildkite.com/clima/climaland-long-runs/builds/4239
The snowy land long run is unchanged compared to main. the Pmodel run is slightly changed, I think because of the set_historical_cache use only. LAI is unchanged between main and this branch for the pmodel


## Content
- add biomass component
- move area index, rooting depth to this component (remove from PlantHydraulics)
- If you choose the plant hydraulics prognostic scheme, you need to define layer thicknesses of the canopy in a multilayer scheme. In this case, we check that the two heights are consistent.
- use "Set historical cache" in the climaland integrated model set_initial cache function (unrelated bug)
- remove construction of pmodel CB which is made automatically in the Simulation struct  (in global_soil_canopy_pmodel.jl)
- remove set_canopy_prescribed_field! in favor of update_biomass!
- lai_consistency check now only happens on init


<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Move LAI, SAI, RAI, rooting depth to new biomass component

## Purpose 
Reduce git repo size


Before I cleared old previews:

```
| Name                         | Value     | Level of concern               |
| ---------------------------- | --------- | ------------------------------ |
| Biggest checkouts            |           |                                |
| * Number of directories  [1] |  67.3 k   | !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! |
| * Maximum path length    [1] |   105 B   | *                              |
| * Number of files        [1] |  86.9 k   | *                              |
| * Total size of files    [1] |  4.83 GiB | *****                          |

[1]  f39a0c3a490baf5a93d35b1f228e52409d947b7d (refs/remotes/origin/gh-pages^{tree})
```



after I cleared:


```
 Biggest checkouts            |           |                                |
| * Number of directories  [3] |  4.38 k   | **                             |
| * Maximum path depth     [3] |     8     |                                |
| * Maximum path length    [3] |   105 B   | *                              |
| * Number of files        [3] |  6.41 k   |                                |
| * Total size of files    [3] |   383 MiB |                                |
| * Number of symlinks     [3] |     8     |                                |
| * Number of submodules       |     0     |                                |
```

title: Add GHA for doc preview cleanup
